name: io.github.gulmezeren2-byte/erp-report-engine
title: ERP Report Engine
description: A guarded, read-only MCP server over the SQL database behind an ERP. The agent sees canonical entities (orders, order_lines, inventory, receivables) - never raw ERP tables - through a provably read-only guard whose refusals are measured by a public benchmark. Profiles: Logo Tiger, Netsis, Mikro.

packageArguments.name: -c
packageArguments.description: path to the engine config YAML (DB via url_env, profile, limits)
